summary: The diff implements most of the required features across REQ-41 through REQ-45. Backend adds DailyOrderRecord type, CRUD functions, admin principal checks, and stable storage migration. Frontend adds AdminGuard component, useIsAdmin/useAddDailyOrderRecord/useDailyOrderRecordsByCustomer/useDeleteDailyOrderRecord hooks, Daily Orders dialog on customer cards, and admin guards on RegularCustomers and OrderHistory pages. A few specific acceptance criteria details are unclear or potentially missing based on the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Gate addRegularCustomer, updateRegularCustomer, recordDailyDelivery, and recordPayment backend functions with admin-only access control returning an error for unauthorized callers
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo is truncated and we cannot confirm all four functions are properly gated. The access control imports and mixins are present but specific function gating is not verifiable in the truncated content.

missing_requirements.requirement: State is preserved across upgrades via stable storage for dailyOrderRecords and nextRecordId
missing_requirements.reason: The migration.mo file defines a migration function that initializes dailyOrderRecords and nextRecordId, and the actor uses 'with migration = Migration.run' syntax, but explicit stable variable declarations for dailyOrderRecords and nextRecordId in main.mo are not visible in the truncated content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each record row has a delete button that calls deleteDailyOrderRecord with confirmation
missing_requirements.reason: The RegularCustomers.tsx imports AlertDialog components and Trash2 icon suggesting confirmation dialogs are implemented, but the file is truncated and the actual delete-with-confirmation implementation in record rows cannot be fully verified.

hallucinated_features.description: URL parameter utilities including getUrlParameter, storeSessionParameter, getSessionParameter, getPersistedUrlParameter, clearSessionParameter, and clearParamFromHash functions
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any URL parameter parsing utilities or session storage management. These utility functions in urlParams.ts appear added without a corresponding requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Admin initialization via a secret token passed as a URL parameter (caffeineAdminToken) using _initializeAccessControlWithSecret
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies admin gating must use Internet Identity principal checks, not passwords or tokens. The useActor.ts calls actor._initializeAccessControlWithSecret(adminToken) using a URL parameter token, which contradicts this constraint.

hallucinated_features.description: MixinAuthorization and AccessControl as separate Motoko authorization modules
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraint states all Motoko logic must remain in a single actor in backend/main.mo. The diff introduces separate authorization modules (authorization/MixinAuthorization and authorization/access-control) imported into main.mo.

hallucinated_features.description: UserProfile management functions (getCallerUserProfile, getUserProfile, saveCallerUserProfile) and userProfiles map
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request makes no mention of user profile management functionality. These functions appear in the backend but are not part of any stated requirement.
